[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111110 6
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 1101111011 8
4 1111111111 a
5 0101111111 8
6 1111111111 a
7 1010111010 6

23 32 1111011010 7

56 65 1010111111 8

70 07 1111110111 9

13 31 1111011111 9
24 42 0101111110 7
35 53 1010111111 8
46 64 1011111110 8
57 75 1011111111 9
60 06 1111110111 9
71 17 1101111111 9

25 52 1111111111 a match 1 2 4 6
36 63 1010111010 6 match 7
47 74 1001111111 8
50 05 1111111111 a match 1 2 4 6
61 16 1111111111 a match 1 2 4 6
72 27 1101111011 8 match 3

37 73 1011111011 8
